name: astramesh
description: AstraMesh unifies AI/ML operations into one secure control surface.

scripts.dev:mesh: concurrently -k -n shell,api -c blue,green "npm run dev:shell" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.build: npm run build:shell && npm run build:api
scripts.lint: npm run lint:shell && npm run lint:api
scripts.test: npm run test:shell && npm run test:api
scripts.dev:stack: concurrently -k -n shell,api,drift,llm,rag,prompt,neural,forge,interview,mlops -c blue,greenBright,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,red,white,gray,orange "npm run dev:shell" "npm run dev:api" "node scripts/start-module-vite.cjs ..\drift-watch\frontend 5401" "node scripts/start-module-vite.cjs ..\llm-judge\frontend 5402" "node scripts/start-module-vite.cjs ..\ragbench\frontend 5403" "node scripts/start-module-vite.cjs ..\prompt-ops\frontend 5404" "node scripts/start-module-vite.cjs ..\neuralscope\frontend 5405" "node scripts/start-module-vite.cjs ..\config-forge\frontend 5406" "node scripts/start-module-vite.cjs ..\interview-os\frontend 5407" "node scripts/start-module-vite.cjs ..\mlops-sentinel\frontend 5408"
scripts.dev:extended: concurrently -k -n shell,api,drift,llm,rag,prompt,neural,forge,interview,mlops,tracer,research,agenticui -c blue,greenBright,green,magenta,cyan,yellow,red,white,gray,orange,purple,teal,whiteBright "npm run dev:shell" "npm run dev:api" "node scripts/start-module-vite.cjs ..\drift-watch\frontend 5401" "node scripts/start-module-vite.cjs ..\llm-judge\frontend 5402" "node scripts/start-module-vite.cjs ..\ragbench\frontend 5403" "node scripts/start-module-vite.cjs ..\prompt-ops\frontend 5404" "node scripts/start-module-vite.cjs ..\neuralscope\frontend 5405" "node scripts/start-module-vite.cjs ..\config-forge\frontend 5406" "node scripts/start-module-vite.cjs ..\interview-os\frontend 5407" "node scripts/start-module-vite.cjs ..\mlops-sentinel\frontend 5408" "node scripts/start-module-vite.cjs ..\agent-tracer\frontend 5409" "node scripts/start-module-vite.cjs ..\agentic-research-assistant\frontend 5410" "node scripts/start-storybook.cjs ..\agentic-ui 6006"
